business.geography_hint: Hollywood Blvd, Los Angeles, CA, USA

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is checking a PLACE (a concert venue): what shows are on, seating floor-vs-balcony, hours, directions, parking, prohibited items. Photos/schedule/logistics ARE the decision, not evaluating a thing or trusting a firm.

goal.one_action: Find an upcoming show and buy tickets (secondary jobs: submit a rental inquiry, subscribe to the announce list)

structure.archetype_note: Venue site: home event feed + full shows schedule + ticket/venue/rental logistics pages. Every ticket CTA hands off to AXS.com external checkout; no on-site cart.

mapped.observed_as: top nav (Ticket Info / Venue Info / Shows / Rental Info / Tiki Bar)
Be the First to Know (email + mobile newsletter signup)
SHOWS (full chronological concert listing w/ ticket buttons)
Floor vs Balcony Tickets / Purchase Online / In-Person / By Phone
RENTAL INFO (award ceremonies, film shoots, corporate, parties, capacity table)
LET'S CONNECT (sales contact card + inquiry form)
CHECK OUT OUR OTHER VENUES! (Roxy, El Rey sister-venue links)

unmapped.observed: SHOWS chronological concert schedule with per-event date/doors/support-act and external GET TICKETS buttons
unmapped.why_no_fit: Not a product catalog, gallery, or pricing table — it is a time-ordered event schedule whose rows redirect to third-party ticketing. No canonical section id models an events calendar.

unmapped.observed: Rental capacity table (Concert 900 / Balcony 155 / Roof 250 / Banquet 306 / Theater 400-621)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Configuration/capacity matrix, not pricing or comparison of plans

proposed_new.name: event-listings
proposed_new.evidence: Home 'Upcoming Events' feed + dedicated /shows page = a chronological schedule of dated concerts, each with artist/support/doors/status and a per-event external ticket-buy redirect (AXS). Not catalog (no own products/cart), not gallery (schedule, not visual proof), not works-catalog (third-party events, not the owner's own body of work).

components_needed: event-schedule list/table (date, artist, doors, ticket-CTA, cancelled state)
rental inquiry form + sales-rep contact card

confidence.why: fetch_quality=rendered, not full: the rental-info and venue-info inquiry form fields never rendered in the DOM snapshot (fields marked unknown), and 'Just Announced' + /100th-anniversary were not independently verified. Overall structure and primary jobs are clear, so medium not low.

gap_findings: No canonical section id or closed capability expresses an EVENT SCHEDULE / concert calendar with per-event external ticket redirect — coined event-listings.

Multi-goal venue site: three competing conversion actions (ticket redirect to AXS, rental lead form, announce-list subscribe) plus a Resy tiki-bar reservation embed — the taxonomy assumes ONE conversion action; place+redirect captures the dominant job but under-represents the rental-lead and subscribe jobs.
Virtual-tour video embed is not video-hero (it is deep on the rental page); no capability vocab term for a standalone venue walkthrough tour.
